recommendations.title: 3Blue1Brown: Neural Networks Series
recommendations.reason: The best visual explanation of backpropagation available. Grant Sanderson's animations make the math intuitive and beautiful.

recommendations.title: Neural Networks and Deep Learning — Michael Nielsen
recommendations.reason: Chapter 2 builds backpropagation from first principles with clear notation and worked examples. Free to read online.

recommendations.title: Stanford CS231n: Backpropagation & Optimization
recommendations.reason: Detailed notes with computational graph examples and gradient derivations. A natural next step for deeper understanding.

recommendations.title: Andrej Karpathy: Building micrograd
recommendations.reason: Build an autograd engine from scratch in Python. Seeing backpropagation implemented makes the theory click.

recommendations.title: Fast.ai: Practical Deep Learning for Coders
recommendations.reason: Now that you understand the theory, apply it. Top-down practical approach to training real neural networks.

recommendations.title: Distill.pub: Backpropagation Interactive Visualization
recommendations.reason: Interactive article exploring gradient descent and momentum with beautiful visualizations you can play with.
